response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled full-stack engineer with 19+ years of experience and strong software craftsmanship fundamentals, but he is fundamentally a web/TypeScript developer whose C++ production experience is minimal—only 6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015. The role requires 8-12 years of hands-on C++ systems development covering multi-threading, message brokers, and IoT architecture. His recent career progression away from systems programming, combined with no demonstrated expertise in industrial automation, IoT protocols, or security standards (SDL, IEC 62443), makes him misaligned with the core technical and domain requirements.
strengths: 19+ years of software development experience with proven expertise in TDD, testing frameworks, and software craftsmanship
Demonstrated mentoring and leadership through code dojos, technical workshops, and team guidance across multiple roles
Strong React and Node.js capabilities with exposure to scalable distributed systems and event-driven architecture concepts
concerns: Minimal C++ production experience (6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015); career trajectory has moved decisively toward web and TypeScript development
No demonstrated knowledge of industrial automation domain, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, OPC UA), or embedded systems design
No evidence of security standards expertise (SDL, IEC 62443-4-1) or secure development lifecycle practices critical for industrial applications

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and mentoring capability
